place: Lamai, Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Three-Bedroom Garden Pool Villa in a Gated Lamai Estate
blurb: A striking three-bedroom pool villa in a gated Lamai residence, styled in crisp black-and-white with a generous 361 m² of single-storey living. A private 8-metre pool and covered terrace, an open designer kitchen, three en-suite bedrooms and round-the-clock estate security. ฿11,600,000.
detail:
Set within a gated residential estate in Lamai — with a secured entrance and 24-hour CCTV — this single-storey villa makes a confident architectural statement. It spans 361 m² of built space on a 480 m² plot, arranged around a private pool and finished, inside and out, in a crisp black-and-white palette that reads as both dramatic and calm.

The open-plan living level pairs a designer kitchen — central island, hood, dishwasher and oven — with living and dining areas that slide open to a covered pool terrace. Three double bedrooms each have an en-suite bathroom and a garden or pool outlook, with a separate storage room and generous glazing drawing light through the home.

Outside, an eight-metre swimming pool runs along a sun terrace framed by tropical planting, especially atmospheric at dusk. Every room is air-conditioned and the villa is offered fully furnished and move-in ready. Held on a registered leasehold; lease terms, floor plan and inventory available on request.
